resources.string: Your personal voice for every character
Download the Kokoro voice engine to bring your characters to life.\n\nOnce ready, ProseCreator will automatically find this device on your network.
Tap the switch above to start. ProseCreator on your computer will discover this device automatically.\n\nKeep both devices on the same Wi-Fi network.
Ready to narrate. ProseCreator has connected at:\n\nhttp://%1$s:%2$d
ProseCreator TTS v1.0 · On-device Kokoro voice engine\nAdverant AI
